Let's think step-by-step. The page is currently on the Bestsellers Report page of Magento Admin. To find the top-1 best-selling product type in Quarter 1 2022, I need to set the reporting period and then show the report.

Firstly, I need to set the period to Quarter 1 2022. The combobox for setting the period has an ID of [2569], and the textboxes for 'From' and 'To' have IDs of [2572] and [2575] respectively.

However, since I can only perform one action at a time, the first action I will take is to open the period combobox. In summary, the next action I will perform is ```click [2569]```.
